acceptance_criteria: approve_work_graph, reconcile external completions, and proposal ingestion verify with git check-ignore that their repo-tracked evidence files (.agentflow/approvals.jsonl, .agentflow/external-completions.jsonl, .agentflow/proposals/) are committable, reusing the fail-actionably pattern init uses for policy.json
A repository whose ignore rules swallow an evidence file gets one actionable message naming the rule instead of silently unshared evidence
summary: Prove committability for every repo-tracked evidence file, not just the enforcement policy
